EasySaveDocs
Table of Contents

Interface IConfig

Namespace
EasyLog
Assembly
EasyLog.dll

Defines the configuration contract required by the logging system. Any class implementing this interface must provide paths, formats, and networking details for the logger.

public interface IConfig

Methods

getBoolLogsOnLocal()

Checks whether the application is configured to persist logs locally on the machine.

bool getBoolLogsOnLocal()

Returns

bool

true if local logging is enabled; otherwise, false.

getBoolLogsOnServer()

Checks whether the application is configured to send logs over the network to a central server.

bool getBoolLogsOnServer()

Returns

bool

true if server logging is enabled; otherwise, false.

getLogDirectoryPath()

Retrieves the directory path where local daily log files are stored.

string getLogDirectoryPath()

Returns

string

A string representing the log directory path.

getLogRealTimeFile()

Retrieves the specific file path used to track the real-time state of ongoing tasks.

string getLogRealTimeFile()

Returns

string

A string representing the real-time log file path.

getLogsFormat()

Retrieves the current global formatting style used for generated logs (e.g., "JSON" or "XML").

string getLogsFormat()

Returns

string

A string representing the log format.

getServerIp()

Retrieves the target IP address of the centralized logging server.

string getServerIp()

Returns

string

A string representing the server's IP address.

getServerPort()

Retrieves the target port number used to connect to the centralized logging server.

int getServerPort()

Returns

int

An integer representing the server's port.

loadConfigFile()

Loads or reloads the configuration settings from the underlying physical file (e.g., a JSON config file).

void loadConfigFile()

setLogsFormat(string)

Updates the formatting style used for future log entries.

void setLogsFormat(string newLogsFormat)

Parameters

newLogsFormat string

The new format to apply (e.g., "JSON" or "XML").

setServerIp(string)

Updates the IP address of the remote centralized logging server.

void setServerIp(string newServerIp)

Parameters

newServerIp string

The new server IP address.

setServerPort(int)

Updates the port number of the remote centralized logging server.

void setServerPort(int newServerPort)

Parameters

newServerPort int

The new server port number.
